name: graphexport
description: Knowledge graph export — generate HTML, Mermaid, GraphML, Cypher, Obsidian, and wiki formats.

tools.name: html
tools.description: Export graph as a standalone HTML page with a simple SVG visualization.

tools.name: mermaid
tools.description: Export graph as Mermaid diagram syntax.

tools.name: graphml
tools.description: Export graph as GraphML XML format.

tools.name: cypher
tools.description: Export graph as Cypher CREATE statements (Neo4j compatible).

tools.name: obsidian
tools.description: Export graph as Obsidian-compatible markdown files with [[wikilinks]].

tools.name: wiki
tools.description: Export graph as a single wiki-style markdown document with sections per node.
